description: The CT Cranium DICOM dataset is loaded in InVesalius 3. Document the skull morphology by creating a 3D surface model from a bone segmentation mask and exporting three standardized anatomical views. Export the Anterior view (Norma Frontalis) to /home/ga/Documents/norma_frontalis.png, the Right Lateral view (Norma Lateralis) to /home/ga/Documents/norma_lateralis.png, and the Inferior view (Norma Basilaris) to /home/ga/Documents/norma_basilaris.png. Ensure the skull is centered and visible in all exported images.
